kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The artisan in Kingsford's levy is between the artisan in Oldwall and the artisan in Bridgegate.
At least two of Beatrix, Edmund, Rowan, and the artisan with 14 coins belong to the North Side.
Godfrey's levy is at least 5 coins more than the artisan in Eastcheap.
Exactly one of these is true: Beatrix goes with 12 coins; Bridgegate goes with 10 coins; Eastcheap goes with 6 coins.
Matilda, Millpond, and 16 coins belong to different artisans.
18 coins goes with at least one of Aldric, Rowan, or Eastcheap.
Between Rowan and 6 coins, one goes with Eastcheap and the other with Highrow.
Either Riverside goes with Cedric or someone in the South Side goes with 12 coins (but not both).
The artisan in Millpond's levy is higher than both Aldric and Matilda.
Matilda's levy is immediately below the artisan in Oldwall.
Exactly one of these is true: Aldric goes with 10 coins; Beatrix goes with Highrow; Matilda goes with 12 coins.
The artisan with 10 coins and the artisan with 16 coins are in the same side of town.
Rowan, Bridgegate, and 14 coins belong to different artisans.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: The angler at Grayreach's weight is between the angler at Pinehollow and the angler at Birchpool.
At least two of Cody, Esther, Wade, and the catch with 17 lb belong to the North Watershed.
Mabel's weight is at least 6 lb more than the angler at Cedarmere.
Exactly one of these is true: Cody goes with 15 lb; Birchpool goes with 13 lb; Cedarmere goes with 9 lb.
Royce, Mossbank, and 19 lb belong to different catches.
21 lb goes with at least one of Boone, Wade, or Cedarmere.
Between Wade and 9 lb, one goes with Cedarmere and the other with Foxglen.
Either Willowmere goes with Dale or someone in the Lowland Basin goes with 15 lb (but not both).
The angler at Mossbank's weight is higher than both Boone and Royce.
Royce's weight is immediately below the angler at Pinehollow.

The catch with 13 lb and the catch with 19 lb are in the same basin.
